name: Railed by the Horse Next Door
description:
Your boyfriend Bowie is a sweet and charming partner. But he’s also a filthy slut who loves getting railed by big cocks — as you find out when you walk into his apartment unannounced. Oops.

See the naughty boy here

Sex isn’t something lacking in your relationship, and Bowie always makes you out to be some sort of sex god when you fuck. But secretly it’s not enough — it’s never enough. His hole needs to be cream-filled at all times.

(For the kind and patient @隼人.png's request, I've added a second non-NTR scenario. No changes to the coding, so he'll behave the same! Enjoy!)
creator: Lachrymose_Noah
